mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification_preference (user_id, push_enabled, email_enabled, categories_json, quiet_hours_start, quiet_hours_end) VALUES (#{userId}, #{pushEnabled}, #{emailEnabled}, #{categoriesJson}, #{quietHoursStart}, #{quietHoursEnd}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE push_enabled = VALUES(push_enabled), email_enabled = VALUES(email_enabled), categories_json = VALUES(categories_json), quiet_hours_start = VALUES(quiet_hours_start), quiet_hours_end = VALUES(quiet_hours_end)
